cost_analysis.note: Backtest plays each suggestion against every historical draw.

prev_suggestions_performance.note: No draws occurred after suggestions were generated.

analysis.llm_summary: Selected top5 and top50 from candidate shortlist based on highest scores. Top5 numbers align well with frequent digits in key positions, especially positions 1 (4,3,8) and 3 (3,9,6). Inclusion of number 4214284 in top50 reflects a repeated historical number. The selection balances score ranking and digit frequency patterns from recent draws.
